pr.title: Non-record: Aweb Ultimate — 1.1190 BPB (10min 8×H100, independent PR #549 reproduction)

output.summary: Reproduced PR #549 SOTA stack with 11L 512d LeakyReLU² Transformer, XSA+Partial RoPE, EMA+SWA, Parallel Muon, GPTQ-lite quant, and TTT evaluation.
techniques: 11-layer 512d LeakyReLU² Transformer with XSA on last tiers and Partial RoPE
Parallel Muon optimizer coupled with EMA+SWA and Legal Score-First TTT schedule
GPTQ-lite int6/int8 quantization plus LZMA compression for the 16MB artifact
